versions.label: version 1 - basic
versions.characterBrief: [Kailash] : snow-capped sacred peaks, crisp high-altitude light, quiet vast scale, cold clear air, prayer-flag hints optional, rocky foreground.
versions.videoLock: [Kailash] : snow-capped sacred peaks, crisp high-altitude light, quiet vast scale, cold clear air, prayer-flag hints optional, rocky foreground.

versions.label: version2 - storm summit
versions.characterBrief: [Kailash] : approaching storm over peaks; dramatic cloud banks; first snow streaks on ridges; wind across stone; electric tension in sky; still sacred scale.
versions.videoLock: [Kailash] : approaching storm over peaks; dramatic cloud banks; first snow streaks on ridges; wind across stone; electric tension in sky; still sacred scale.

versions.label: version3 - dawn ridge
versions.characterBrief: [Kailash] : first light on eastern ridges; rose and gold on snow; long shadows; thin cold air; distant summit glow; silence and immensity.
versions.videoLock: [Kailash] : first light on eastern ridges; rose and gold on snow; long shadows; thin cold air; distant summit glow; silence and immensity.

versions.label: version1 - morning river mist
versions.characterBrief: [Varanasi ghats] : wide Ganga steps; morning mist on water; diyas and soft smoke; ochre stone; distant temples; slow river current; human scale against river expanse.
versions.videoLock: [Varanasi ghats] : wide Ganga steps; morning mist on water; diyas and soft smoke; ochre stone; distant temples; slow river current; human scale against river expanse.

versions.label: version2 - evening aarti glow
versions.characterBrief: [Varanasi ghats] : evening lamps; warm firelight on faces and water; bell sound implied visually; crowded terraces readable but not chaotic; gold reflections on river.
versions.videoLock: [Varanasi ghats] : evening lamps; warm firelight on faces and water; bell sound implied visually; crowded terraces readable but not chaotic; gold reflections on river.

versions.label: version1 - pastoral noon
versions.characterBrief: [Vrindavan] : tangled sacred groves; filtered sun; dust motes; cattle paths; Yamuna glimpse optional; soft greens and warm earth; gentle breeze in leaves.
versions.videoLock: [Vrindavan] : tangled sacred groves; filtered sun; dust motes; cattle paths; Yamuna glimpse optional; soft greens and warm earth; gentle breeze in leaves.

versions.label: version2 - monsoon green
versions.characterBrief: [Vrindavan] : saturated monsoon greens; wet bark; heavy clouds with silver edges; puddles reflecting canopy; humid air visible in haze.
versions.videoLock: [Vrindavan] : saturated monsoon greens; wet bark; heavy clouds with silver edges; puddles reflecting canopy; humid air visible in haze.

versions.label: version1 - pine and mist
versions.characterBrief: [Himalayan forest] : high-altitude pine and deodar; mist between trunks; mossy stones; distant snow glimpses; cold breath in air; quiet birdless hush.
versions.videoLock: [Himalayan forest] : high-altitude pine and deodar; mist between trunks; mossy stones; distant snow glimpses; cold breath in air; quiet birdless hush.

versions.label: version1 - gentle tide
versions.characterBrief: [Ocean at dawn] : low horizon; soft apricot sky; slow rolling waves; wet sand mirror; distant fishing boats as silhouettes; salt haze; vast calm.
versions.videoLock: [Ocean at dawn] : low horizon; soft apricot sky; slow rolling waves; wet sand mirror; distant fishing boats as silhouettes; salt haze; vast calm.

versions.label: version1 - lamp night
versions.characterBrief: [Temple courtyard] : carved stone pillars; oil lamps in niches; warm pools of light; jasmine garlands; open sky square above; incense smoke layers; intimate sacred scale.
versions.videoLock: [Temple courtyard] : carved stone pillars; oil lamps in niches; warm pools of light; jasmine garlands; open sky square above; incense smoke layers; intimate sacred scale.

versions.label: version2 - daylight festival
versions.characterBrief: [Temple courtyard] : bright midday; marigold streamers; brass details catching sun; crowd suggestion in soft depth; festive colour without losing stone architecture read.
versions.videoLock: [Temple courtyard] : bright midday; marigold streamers; brass details catching sun; crowd suggestion in soft depth; festive colour without losing stone architecture read.

versions.label: version1 - ice lingam chamber
versions.characterBrief: [Amarnath cave] : natural ice cavern; blue-white ice textures; single shaft of cold light; dripping water; echoing stillness; humbling scale inside stone.
versions.videoLock: [Amarnath cave] : natural ice cavern; blue-white ice textures; single shaft of cold light; dripping water; echoing stillness; humbling scale inside stone.
